content.hero-statement: 8+ years at the intersection of environmental science and industrial compliance — driven by curiosity, precision, and a genuine love for the work.
content.about-lead: Koo Soyeon is a Senior Environmental Analyst with over eight years of experience in air quality monitoring and pollutant analysis.
content.about-body: Specializing in industrial emissions and ambient air assessment, she applies rigorous analytical methodologies to deliver data that withstands regulatory scrutiny. Her work spans the full measurement lifecycle — from instrument calibration and sample collection through laboratory analysis, quality assurance, and compliance reporting.
content.exp-d-1: Industrial stack emissions and ambient air assessment across regulated and unregulated pollutant classes.
content.exp-d-2: Quantitative detection of aldehydes, phenols, hydrogen chloride, and volatile organic compounds.
content.exp-d-3: Trace-level identification of metals and volatile compounds using validated laboratory instrumentation.
content.exp-d-4: Data integrity assurance, QA/QC protocols, and compliance reporting to environmental regulatory standards.
content.mth-f-1: ICP-OES — Inductively Coupled Plasma Optical Emission Spectroscopy
content.mth-d-1: Multi-element trace metal analysis in aqueous and digested environmental matrices.
content.mth-d-2: Separation and quantification of volatile and semi-volatile organic compounds.
content.mth-d-3: Single-element determination of metals at trace and ultra-trace concentrations.
content.mth-d-4: Definitive identification and quantification of complex organic mixtures and unknowns.
content.con-lead: Available for professional consultation and technical collaboration.
content.con-sub: Reach out via LinkedIn to discuss projects, partnerships, or just to say hi!
